hero_subtitle: SFTY gives VASP leadership clear visibility into compliance workflows by connecting provider outputs, preserving audit evidence, and supporting multi-jurisdictional regulatory readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Digital asset businesses struggle to maintain a unified operational view as compliance data and decisions remain scattered across multiple providers and systems. This fragmentation slows regulatory review readiness and weakens the auditability that executives rely on to manage risk effectively.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider data, compliance cases, decision logs and evidence into a single control layer so VASP leadership can monitor risk, audit readiness and regulatory workflows confidently.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects diverse provider checks through risk rules, case workflows, decision logging and evidence preservation to support audit-ready compliance outcomes.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another provider. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives VASP executives a provider-neutral layer that connects compliance outputs into audit-ready decisions, case evidence and oversight for regulatory readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP executives with a controlled compliance layer that preserves evidence, connects provider outputs and prepares thorough due diligence for regulatory review.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected compliance control layer, improving risk visibility, operational oversight, audit readiness and streamlined workflows across KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and reporting.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support regulatory readiness?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures regulatory workflows by connecting provider outputs, enabling rule updates, case management, decision logging and evidence preservation aligned with evolving jurisdictional requirements.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and evidence packages that support audit readiness and provide defensible records of compliance decisions and regulatory activities.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers and tools, orchestrating their outputs into integrated workflows without disrupting current systems or compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers by turning their outputs into structured compliance workflows and evidence.
final_title: Bring VASP compliance into one controlled layer
final_description: Review how SFTY supports audit-ready evidence, case workflows and multi-jurisdictional regulatory readiness for executive risk control.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
